steps.expected: OS boots with title bar showing icon + 'Untitled' + clock, content area with text cursor
steps.observed: Title bar shows document icon + 'Untitled' + clock (06:56:37), text cursor visible at top-left of content area

steps.expected: Text 'hello world' appears in content area with cursor at end
steps.observed: 'hello world' displayed in content area, cursor visible at end of text, clock advanced to 06:57:10

steps.action: Send Ctrl+Tab to switch to image viewer
steps.expected: Content switches to image viewer, title bar icon changes to image icon
steps.observed: Colorful test image (gradient + circle) displayed centered on screen, title bar icon changed from document icon to image icon, name remains 'Untitled', clock at 06:57:31

steps.action: Send Ctrl+Tab to switch back to text editor
steps.expected: Text editor restored with 'hello world' preserved, cursor position preserved, title bar icon reverts
steps.observed: 'hello world' fully preserved in content area, cursor visible at end of text, title bar icon reverted to document icon, clock at 06:57:54

evidence.serialLog: Clean boot, no errors. Compositor present messages show dirty-rect transfers (1280x36 for title bar, 1280x26 for content). No crashes or panics.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-CROSS-001 (Full demo flow with Ctrl+Tab) — complete flow verified: boot → type text → Ctrl+Tab to image viewer → Ctrl+Tab back to editor. Text preserved, icon switches on context change, clock ticks throughout. Serial log clean with no errors.
